threshold_policy: hard per-cell threshold in feature extraction; sub-threshold deposits are absent
reference_definition: unmasked 1 MeV, four-neighbour reconstructed cluster count nCl4 == 1; target rates frozen from seed-6302026 validation events

guarded_target.definition: fixed +0.5 percentage-point validation margin before confirmation

split.validation: seed 6302026 eventID mod 4 == 2; candidate and cut selection
split.confirmation: all 100k events from independent seed 7302026; no refit

none.selection_rule: maximum seed-6302026 validation electron retention among declared standard, compact, and hurdle candidates at the unmasked T1 target

bac7.selection_rule: maximum seed-6302026 validation electron retention among declared standard, compact, and hurdle candidates at the unmasked T1 target

sdc2_42.selection_rule: maximum seed-6302026 validation electron retention among declared standard, compact, and hurdle candidates at the unmasked T1 target

sdc2_bac49.selection_rule: maximum seed-6302026 validation electron retention among declared standard, compact, and hurdle candidates at the unmasked T1 target

sdc1active_bac66.selection_rule: maximum seed-6302026 validation electron retention among declared standard, compact, and hurdle candidates at the unmasked T1 target

sdc1full_bac80.selection_rule: maximum seed-6302026 validation electron retention among declared standard, compact, and hurdle candidates at the unmasked T1 target
